message:
test(fnp-python): expand count_nonzero empty-array keepdims parity

Adds a second live-NumPy conformance test covering the empty-array
keepdims variants not exercised by the existing primary test: 1-D empty
input with axis=0 and axis=None, axis=None on a 2-D empty, the
keepdims=False path on a 2-D empty, and 3-D empty inputs where the
zero-size dimension is interior (axis=0, axis=(0,2), axis=None). Each
case pins both output shape and flattened payload against NumPy 2.x.

Closes franken_numpy-kg6p.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
